label: GmR

label: N-acetyltransferase
note: UniProt P23181 (AACC1_PSEAI) annotates DOMAIN 25-177 'N-acetyltransferase' (PROSITE-ProRule PRU00532; Pfam PF00583 Acetyltransf_1; InterPro IPR000182 GNAT).

label: GNAT motif A
